qry:select.name: QRY_CLASE_ORG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' ORDER BY oi_clase_org ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTRUCTURAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org AS oi_estructura FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org = {#SOURCE:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTR_SIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_UNIDAD_ORG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.c_unidad_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org FROM ORG01_UNI_ORG, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS JOIN ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEGAJOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estruc_pers, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG03_EMPRESAS JOIN ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_empresa!='') {% AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#PARAMIN:@oi_empresa} %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#PARAMIN:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=string(#PARAMIN:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)%}) %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW
